Templates
Tips
  • Click a block above to add it.
  • Drag the header to move blocks.
  • Left-drag empty space to select blocks.
  • Middle-drag to pan the canvas.
  • Ctrl+G group selected blocks.
  • Ctrl+C copy, Ctrl+V paste.
  • Del delete selected blocks.
  • @ mentions a character.
  • # links another quest.
  • Ctrl+Z undo, Ctrl+Y redo.
